bundles.name: Partner Bundle
bundles.subtitle: IB
bundles.audience: For the trader who wants every algorithm at the lowest entry — and is happy to trade through a recommended broker.
features: All three EAs — Omnicor, Cenith, Golden
bundles.ibNote: Requires registration under one of the recommended IB brokers below. We're transparent about this — it's how the Partner price stays this low.

bundles.name: Standard Bundle
bundles.subtitle: Non-IB
bundles.audience: For the established trader with broker loyalty who wants full flexibility and no strings.
features: All three EAs — Omnicor, Cenith, Golden

bundles.name: Founding Members Bundle
bundles.subtitle: Flagship
bundles.audience: For the builder who wants ownership, not a rental — the source code, the ecosystem, and a permanent seat at the original price.
features: All three EA source codes (.mq5) — delivered instantly
PolyBot full Python source — after the Q3 2026 launch
Everything the lab ships next, at this same price

polybot.name: PolyBot
polybot.disclaimer: PolyBot is in development, with public launch planned for Q3 2026. A limited group of Founding Members is in early, closed testing. No performance claims are made; the full Python source is delivered at launch.

subscription.allAccessNote: One subscription, both signals — Crypto Futures and Polymarket. Live signals are delivered in a private channel; you place every trade yourself.

scarcityNote: These counters are updated by hand and reflect real spots. When a bundle fills, its pricing closes permanently — no countdown timers, no resets, no second run at these numbers.
